description: Fix dead code in the Twitch GQL function where auth cache clearing on HTTP 401/403 is unreachable because fetchFromPage auto-throws before the response.ok check.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/twitch && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Move auth cache clearing to the catch block where fetchFromPage errors are handled
userStories.description: The gql() function has dead code: lines 96-101 check response.ok after fetchFromPage, but fetchFromPage auto-throws ToolError on non-ok status, making these lines unreachable. Move the clearAuthCache call to a catch block that handles ToolError from fetchFromPage.
acceptanceCriteria: A try/catch wraps the fetchFromPage call, and the catch block checks for auth-category ToolError and calls clearAuthCache('twitch')
The httpStatusToToolError import is removed if no longer used elsewhere in the file
